title: Thalagireeshwarar Temple

overview.short: Talagirisvara Temple is a Hindu temple located in the village of Panamalai in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India.
overview.description: Talagirisvara Temple is a Hindu temple located in the village of Panamalai in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Ananthapuram
topPlaces.description: Ananthapuram is a panchayat town in Viluppuram district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

topPlaces.name: Mandagapattu Temple
topPlaces.description: Mandagapattu Tirumurti Temple is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Mandagapattu in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. Hewn from rock by the Pallava ruler Mahendravarman I in honour of the trinity Brahma-Shiva-Vishnu, the rock-cut cave temple is the oldest stone shrine discovered and dated in Tamil Nadu.

topPlaces.name: Gingee
topPlaces.description: Gingee, also known as Senji or Jinji and originally called Singapuri, is a panchayat town in Viluppuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Gingee is located between three hills covering a perimeter of 3 km, and lies west of the Sankaraparani River.

topPlaces.name: Gingee block
topPlaces.description: The Gingee block is a revenue block in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 60 panchayat villages.

topPlaces.name: Gingee taluk
topPlaces.description: Gingee taluk is a taluk of Viluppuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Gingee.

items.note: Ananthapuram is a panchayat town in Viluppuram district in the state of Tamil Nadu, India.

Mandagapattu Tirumurti Temple is a Hindu temple situated in the village of Mandagapattu in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. Hewn from rock by the Pallava ruler Mahendravarman I in honour of the trinity Brahma-Shiva-Vishnu, the rock-cut cave temple is the oldest stone shrine discovered and dated in Tamil Nadu.

Gingee, also known as Senji or Jinji and originally called Singapuri, is a panchayat town in Viluppuram district in the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. Gingee is located between three hills covering a perimeter of 3 km, and lies west of the Sankaraparani River.
The Gingee block is a revenue block in the Viluppuram district of Tamil Nadu, India. It has a total of 60 panchayat villages.
Gingee taluk is a taluk of Viluppuram district of the Indian state of Tamil Nadu. The headquarters of the taluk is the town of Gingee.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thalagireeshwarar Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thalagireeshwarar Temple is Nov – Feb. Summers are 26–36°C and winters are 22–32°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thalagireeshwarar Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Chennai International Airport (131 km) and the nearest railway station is Chennai Central (146 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thalagireeshwarar Temple?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thalagireeshwarar Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thalagireeshwarar Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Thalagireeshwarar Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thalagireeshwarar Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Ananthapuram, Mandagapattu Temple, Gingee, Gingee block, Gingee taluk.
